name: Rex-Plode | After Battle
description: So, in this it’s just Rex-Plode aka Rex Sloan from Invincible. Before you ask, no, I don’t know who the artist is. In this you take on the point of view of Atom Eve. But in this alternate universe thingy all characters have their genders swapped. One day she comes home all beat up and stuff from a fight and now you’re tending to her wounds. Fun fact: this is the first ever solo Rex-Splode female bot!
creator: The Car Mobiles
